result.stdout:
TinyRecoil.Relay:
  connect there and provider proxy service.

Usage:
  TinyRecoil.Relay [options]

Options:
  -m, --map <map>    map local port to remote port, e.g. 8080:127.0.0.1:8081
  --version          Display version information
